refined_caption: The hospital food tray contains a tray of food and utensils that appear unappetizing. The food does not look fresh or appealing.
complaint_description: I was disappointed with the food served to me during my hospital stay. The food on my tray looked unappetizing and did not smell fresh. I was expecting a more satisfying meal to help with my recovery.
voice_text: The food they're serving here looks really unappetizing, I'm not sure I want to eat it.
